Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [cdoern,lsm5] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> LGTM, any actual testing changes we need to make here?

dunno, i'll defer to @jwhonce

/lgtm 

There are some warnings about deprecated code both are in other packages so looking good!

.tox/py311/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pkg_resources/_vendor/pyparsing.py:87
  /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman-py/.tox/py311/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pkg_resources/_vendor/pyparsing.py:87: DeprecationWarning: module 'sre_constants' is deprecated
    import sre_constants

.tox/py311/lib/python3.11/site-packages/testtools/testresult/real.py:25
  /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman-py/.tox/py311/lib/python3.11/site-packages/testtools/testresult/real.py:25: DeprecationWarning: 'cgi' is deprecated and slated for removal in Python 3.13
    import cgi
